name: Family TV Planner
description: Shows a shared household calendar on Android TV, syncing events from Google, Outlook, and iOS. Voice commands add or modify events, while reminders appear as on‑screen alerts, keeping families coordinated without checking phones.

name: Local Gem Explorer
description: Explore unseen local spots from your couch: the app uses your phone’s location to surface nearby hidden restaurants, parks, art, and events, delivering short video tours and map navigation, letting you plan spontaneous outings directly from Android TV.

name: HomeHub Explorer
description: HomeHub Explorer turns your Android TV into a shared family hub that syncs calendars, shows reminders, and lets you discover nearby hidden restaurants, parks, and events—all via voice. Plan outings, add events, and watch short video tours right on the big screen, keeping everyone coordinated and inspired.

name: Local Live Lens
description: Turn your Android TV into a window to your neighborhood. Using your phone’s GPS, the app streams live webcam feeds, micro‑news, and real‑time updates from nearby cafés, parks, and streets, letting you watch the community pulse and discover places before you go.

name: Satisfy Sort TV
description: A visual, gamified organizer for Android TV that lets you drag and drop photos, apps, and playlists into custom shelves, rewarding you with soothing animations and points, turning household digital clutter into a satisfying, tactile experience you can enjoy from your couch.
